name: title.anvilcraft.patchouli.smithing.tier_1_materials
pages: This page shows all available $(thing)tier 1 materials$(). $(br)$(li)$(l:smithing/tier_1_materials#royal_steel_ingot)Royal Steel$() $(li)$(l:smithing/tier_1_materials#cursed_gold_ingot)Cursed Gold$()

pages.text: $(item)Royal Steel Ingot$() has metallic and jewellic, high durability and enchantment affinity.

An item emanating a curse aura. The carriers will get $(thing)debuffs$(), and hitting by a lightning bolt when using $(item)Royal Anvil$(). $(br2)Gold Ingot will turn into Cursed Gold Ingot when using $(l:smithing/tier_1_materials#royal_grindstone)Royal Grindstone$() to remove curses and repair costs from items. $(br2)$(item)Piglin$() holding curse gold will be zombified and drop additional curse gold upon death. $(li)Can be used to product $(l:apply/corrupted_beacon)Corrupted Beacon$(/l)
